page_content:
Formerly: COMM768.

COMM749 Advanced Simultaneous Interpretation (1-3 Credits)

Builds simultaneous interpreting skills to a highly professional level, including highly complex material requiring particular attention

to nuance, tone, and style. Resolves any remaining challenges of

split attention, ear-voice span, memory and delivery / presentation. Introduces simultaneous interpretation with text, based upon sight translation techniques. Participants emerge from the course as reflective practitioners with the simultaneous interpreting skills required to perform competently in real-world settings.

Prerequisite: COMM729; and admissions test for second-year courses; and permission of ARHU-Communication department.

Repeatable to: 4 credits if content differs.
